title: Install lockfile compiler runtime dependencies explicitly in CI
outOfScope: Lockfile content or dependency selection changes.
Release publication, tags, provider assets, and adopter-project installation.

sources.reason: The CI lockfile lane installs pip-tools without its required typing_extensions runtime dependency.
Regression coverage must enforce explicit lockfile compiler runtime dependencies.
The failing CI lane invokes the shared lockfile reproducibility target.
Provider evidence shows ModuleNotFoundError: typing_extensions in the lockfile lane.

riskAssessment.reason: The CI lane can fail before exercising the release gate when its compiler runtime dependencies are implicit.

executionDecision.reason: The failed provider job identifies a narrow workflow dependency defect with a deterministic fix.

preReviewWarnings: Keep compiler installation explicit and deterministic without changing the committed lockfile.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: Compatibility CI installs pip-tools and typing_extensions before invoking make check-lockfile-reproducibility.
A workflow regression test asserts the explicit typing_extensions installation command.

intent.problem: The CI lockfile lane installs pip-tools without explicitly installing typing_extensions; the current pip-tools package then fails at import time before the reproducibility check runs.
constraints: Fix the workflow dependency contract, not the lockfile output.
Keep release publication frozen until this Work Item and the blocked predecessor PR are resolved.
intent.rationale: A deterministic CI environment must exercise the intended lockfile gate rather than fail because an implicit compiler runtime dependency is missing.

rawUserRequest: When CI or PR exposes a process problem, stop publication and fix the root workflow first. Do not bypass the failure or create a budget-only Work Item.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: CI lockfile lane imports pip-tools and completes lockfile comparison.
scenarioCoverage.reason: Provider CI must verify after push.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User authorized root-cause workflow improvement before resuming release; the archive budget change is part of this functional Work Item.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
